label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out between what times Leslie could have gone to the movies today. The problem gives me some information about Leslie's schedule and when different people saw her. First, Leslie woke up at 6am. Then Susan saw her on a rooftop from 6am to 7am. So from 6 to 7 am, Leslie was on the rooftop. Then Mary saw her working at the office from 12pm to 2pm. So between 12 and 2 pm, Leslie was at the office. Then Steven saw her getting coffee at the cafe from 2pm to 7pm. Wait, 2pm to 7pm? That's a long time for getting coffee, but okay. Also, the movies closed after 7pm, so Leslie had to go before that. So the movies are closed after 7pm, so the latest she could have gone is before 7pm. Now I need to see when Leslie was free. Let's map out her schedule: - 6am to 7am: on the rooftop (Susan) - Then from 7am onwards, what? Until 12pm, there's no info. Then from 12pm to 2pm at the office (Mary). Then from 2pm to 7pm at the cafe (Steven). So possible free times would be between the activities. Let's see: From 7am to 12pm: Leslie isn't mentioned. So maybe she could have gone to the movies during that time?
